translations.en: I drink only water in the evenings.
translations.es: Por las noches solo bebo agua.
translations.fr: Le soir, je ne bois que de l’eau.
translations.ru: По вечерам я пью только воду.
translations.pt: Eu só bebo água à noite.
translations.vi: Buổi tối tôi chỉ uống nước.
translations.hi: शाम को मैं सिर्फ पानी पीता हूँ.
translations.nb: Om kvelden drikker jeg bare vann.
translations.id: Di malam hari saya hanya minum air.
translations.sv: På kvällen dricker jag bara vatten.
translations.da: Om aftenen drikker jeg kun vand.
translations.ja: 夜は水しか飲みません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; syntactic subject of the finite verb 'trinke'.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting an accusative object ('Wasser').
Temporal adverb indicating habitual time-of-day; modifies the verb phrase ('trinke').
Restrictive/focusing adverb; scopes over the object, specifying that only 'Wasser' is drunk.
Neuter mass noun, singular, accusative; direct object of 'trinke'.

sentences.target: Hier kann man ausschließlich mit Karte bezahlen.
sentences.reading: /hiːɐ̯ kan man ˈaʊ̯sʃliːslɪç mɪt ˈkaʁtə bəˈtsaːlən/

translations.de: Hier kann man ausschließlich mit Karte bezahlen.
translations.ipa: /hiːɐ̯ kan man ˈaʊ̯sʃliːslɪç mɪt ˈkaʁtə bəˈtsaːlən/
translations.en: You can pay only by card here.
translations.es: Aquí solo se puede pagar con tarjeta.
translations.fr: Ici, on ne peut payer que par carte.
translations.it: Qui si può pagare solo con carta.
translations.pt: Aqui só dá para pagar com cartão.
translations.vi: Ở đây chỉ có thể thanh toán bằng thẻ.
translations.nl: Hier kun je alleen met kaart betalen.
translations.hi: यहाँ सिर्फ कार्ड से भुगतान किया जा सकता है.
translations.el: Εδώ μπορείς να πληρώσεις μόνο με κάρτα.
translations.nb: Her kan du bare betale med kort.
translations.id: Di sini hanya bisa bayar dengan kartu.
translations.sv: Här kan man bara betala med kort.
translations.ro: Aici poți plăti doar cu cardul.
translations.cs: Tady se dá platit jen kartou.
translations.da: Her kan man kun betale med kort.
translations.ja: ここではカードでしか支払えません。

tokens.explanation: Locative adverb setting the place; modifies the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects the infinitive 'bezahlen' and forms an impersonal construction with 'man'.
Impersonal/indefinite pronoun, nominative singular; generalized subject (3rd person) of the modal construction.
Restrictive adverb; limits the manner/method to the following PP and VP ('mit Karte bezahlen').
Preposition governing dative; introduces the instrument/payment medium.
Feminine noun, singular, dative as complement of 'mit'; denotes the payment card.
Lexical verb, infinitive; complement of modal 'kann', head of the main VP.

sentences.target: Lisa isst seit Wochen ausschließlich Gemüse.

translations.de: Lisa isst seit Wochen ausschließlich Gemüse.
translations.en: Lisa has been eating only vegetables for weeks.
translations.es: Lisa lleva semanas comiendo solo verduras.
translations.fr: Lisa ne mange que des légumes depuis des semaines.
translations.it: Lisa mangia solo verdure da settimane.
translations.ko: 리사는 몇 주째 채소만 먹고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 丽莎已经连续几周只吃蔬菜。
translations.yue: Lisa幾個星期以嚟淨係食菜。
translations.ru: Лиза уже несколько недель ест только овощи.
translations.pt: A Lisa está há semanas comendo só verduras.
translations.he: ליסה אוכלת רק ירקות כבר כמה שבועות.
translations.vi: Lisa đã ăn toàn rau suốt mấy tuần nay.
translations.ar: ليزا تأكل الخضروات فقط منذ أسابيع.
translations.nl: Lisa eet al weken alleen groenten.
translations.uk: Ліза вже кілька тижнів їсть лише овочі.
translations.hu: Lisa hetek óta csak zöldséget eszik.
translations.hi: लीसा कई हफ्तों से सिर्फ सब्जियाँ खा रही है.
translations.pl: Lisa od tygodni je tylko warzywa.
translations.el: Η Λίζα τρώει μόνο λαχανικά εδώ και εβδομάδες.
translations.nb: Lisa har spist bare grønnsaker i ukevis.
translations.id: Lisa sudah berminggu-minggu hanya makan sayur.
translations.sv: Lisa har bara ätit grönsaker i veckor.
translations.ro: Lisa mănâncă doar legume de săptămâni întregi.
translations.cs: Lisa jí už týdny jen zeleninu.
translations.da: Lisa har kun spist grøntsager i ugevis.
translations.fi: Lisa on syönyt jo viikkoja vain vihanneksia.
translations.ja: リサは何週間も野菜しか食べていません。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun (personal name), nominative singular; clause subject.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'Gemüse' as accusative object.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a duration/time span.
Plural noun, dative plural as complement of 'seit'; expresses duration ('for weeks').
Restrictive adverb; scopes over the object, meaning nothing but 'Gemüse' is eaten.
Neuter mass noun, singular (uncountable), accusative; direct object of 'isst'.

sentences.target: Die Tickets gibt es ausschließlich online.

translations.de: Die Tickets gibt es ausschließlich online.
translations.en: The tickets are available only online.
translations.es: Las entradas solo están disponibles en línea.
translations.fr: Les billets ne sont disponibles qu’en ligne.
translations.it: I biglietti sono disponibili solo online.
translations.yue: 門票只可以喺網上買到。
translations.pt: Os ingressos estão disponíveis só online.
translations.nl: De tickets zijn alleen online verkrijgbaar.
translations.hu: A jegyek csak online érhetők el.
translations.el: Τα εισιτήρια είναι διαθέσιμα μόνο στο ίντερνετ.
translations.cs: Lístky jsou k dispozici jen online.
translations.ja: チケットはオンラインでのみ購入できます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; here accusative plural agreeing with 'Tickets' (fronted object in 'es gibt' existential).
Plural noun; accusative plural as the object of the existential verb 'gibt' (topicalized to clause-initial position).
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; part of the existential construction 'es gibt' selecting an accusative object.
Neuter pronoun used as an expletive/dummy subject in 'es gibt'; nominative, no semantic referent.
Restrictive adverb; indicates exclusivity of the mode/place of availability.
Adverb (borrowed); specifies medium/place of availability ('exclusively online').
